questions.question: How many heads does the beast from the sea have?
questions.feedback: The beast had ten horns and seven heads.

questions.question: What number is associated with the beast?
questions.feedback: The number of the beast is 666 — the number of a man.

questions.question: The second beast from the earth performs great signs including making fire come down from heaven.
questions.feedback: The second beast performs great signs, even making fire come from heaven.

questions.question: The beast was given authority over every tribe, people, language, and _____.
questions.feedback: The beast was given authority over every tribe, people, language, and nation.

questions.question: No one could buy or sell unless they had the _____ of the beast.
questions.feedback: No one could buy or sell without the mark of the beast.
